items.description: Expand repository validation so TypeScript typechecking covers source and tests without changing runtime behavior.
steps: Inspect the current tsconfig and package scripts.
Update configuration or scripts so tests are included in typechecking.
Run npm test and npx tsc --noEmit successfully.
Confirm no runtime behavior changed.
items.regression_notes: Typechecking now includes tests via tsconfig include; allowImportingTsExtensions matches existing test import style.

items.description: Add a bundle parser and validator for .ralph/plan.md, .ralph/items.json, .ralph/prompt.md, and .ralph/progress.md.
steps: Create a small module for bundle-mode file discovery and validation.
Validate the required items.json schema and tolerate optional runtime_contract metadata.
Reject missing, unreadable, malformed, escaping, or unsafe symlinked bundle files.
Add unit tests for valid and invalid bundle shapes.
items.regression_notes: Added bundle.ts parser/loader with required file, symlink, workspace, schema, and runtime_contract validation plus focused unit coverage.

items.description: Detect bundle mode when /ralph-loop is started with @.ralph/prompt.md or an equivalent prompt reference.
steps: Normalize supported prompt reference forms after argument parsing.
Set bundle-mode state only for the generated prompt path.
Preserve non-bundle /ralph-loop behavior for arbitrary prompts.
Add tests for bundle and non-bundle detection.
items.regression_notes: Bundle-mode prompt references now validate the bundle and load .ralph/prompt.md; arbitrary prompt references keep existing non-bundle behavior.

items.description: Extend persisted loop state for backward-compatible bundle-mode metadata and active-loop locking.
steps: Add optional bundle_mode, loop_token, and snapshot-related fields to state parsing and writing.
Ensure older .ralph/loop.md files still parse correctly.
Reject new loop starts when active running state exists.
Add tests for old state compatibility and active-loop rejection.
items.regression_notes: Persisted state now round-trips bundle metadata fields, legacy state defaults remain readable, bundle starts set bundle_mode, and active running state blocks new loop starts.

items.description: Record pre-iteration snapshots for bundle items, progress file state, source docs, and git HEAD when bundle mode is active.
steps: Snapshot item immutable fields and pass states before sending the iteration prompt.
Snapshot .ralph/progress.md prefix-relevant state before the iteration.
Snapshot configured source doc hashes from runtime_contract.source_docs.
Add tests proving snapshots are available for gate evaluation.
items.regression_notes: Bundle-mode iterations now persist item immutable/pass snapshots, progress size/hash, configured source doc hashes, and an aggregate snapshot hash before prompts are sent.

items.description: Implement structural NEXT gate evaluation for exactly one completed item and immutable item fields.
steps: Evaluate post-iteration items.json after a syntactically valid NEXT promise.
Reject NEXT when zero or multiple items move from passes:false to passes:true.
Reject NEXT when existing item category, description, or steps are rewritten.
Add tests for accepted NEXT, zero-completion rejection, multi-completion rejection, and immutable-field rejection.
items.regression_notes: Bundle NEXT now validates the pre-iteration item snapshot against post-iteration items.json before session transition, accepting exactly one false-to-true item and rejecting zero, multiple, or immutable-field rewrites.

items.description: Implement structural COMPLETE gate evaluation so completion is accepted only when every item passes and immutable fields are intact.
steps: Evaluate post-iteration items.json after a syntactically valid COMPLETE promise.
Reject COMPLETE when any item still has passes:false.
Reject COMPLETE when existing item immutable fields changed.
Add tests for accepted COMPLETE and incomplete-plan rejection.
items.regression_notes: Bundle COMPLETE now validates the pre-iteration item snapshot before finalizing, accepting only when every item passes and rejecting incomplete plans or immutable-field rewrites.

items.description: Add rejection prompt handling that keeps the current iteration active and does not create a fresh session.
steps: Create a concise rejection prompt format naming the failed invariant.
Send rejection prompts in the current session after failed NEXT or COMPLETE gates.
Ensure rejected NEXT does not increment iteration or call newSession.
Add tests for rejection prompt content and no-transition behavior.
items.regression_notes: Bundle gate rejections now send concise corrective prompts in the current session while preserving iteration state and avoiding newSession transitions.

items.description: Enforce append-only .ralph/progress.md behavior and configured source-document hash protection in bundle mode.
steps: Check that progress.md retains its previous prefix and grows when progress append enforcement is enabled.
Check that configured source docs remain unchanged before accepting NEXT or COMPLETE.
Reject promise acceptance when either invariant fails.
Add tests for progress rewrite, missing append, valid append, and source-doc mutation.
items.regression_notes: Bundle gates now reject progress rewrites, missing appends, and configured source-doc mutations before accepting NEXT or COMPLETE.

items.description: Add bounded explicit verification gate execution for runtime_contract.verification_gates or document deferral if it cannot stay small.
steps: Implement bounded gate execution from workspace root when it remains simple and safe.
Cap output included in rejection messages.
Reject NEXT and COMPLETE when any configured gate fails, times out, or cannot run.
If deferred, document the deferral clearly and keep prompt-level verification requirements intact.
items.regression_notes: Bundle gates now run configured verification commands from the workspace root with timeout/output caps and reject NEXT or COMPLETE on command failure.

items.description: Document the PRD/SPEC to ralph-plan to /ralph-loop workflow and the bundle-mode runtime contract.
steps: Update README or local docs with the recommended workflow.
Document bundle-mode detection and required .ralph files.
Document what runtime gates enforce and any intentionally deferred gates.
Run documentation-related checks if present.
items.regression_notes: README now documents the PRD/SPEC to ralph-plan to /ralph-loop workflow, bundle-mode detection, required files, runtime_contract metadata, acceptance gates, and rejection behavior.

items.description: Run full regression, typecheck, and live Pi smoke validation for accepted and rejected promise lifecycles through the user's TIA-wrapped Pi entrypoint.
steps: Run npm test successfully.
Run npx tsc --noEmit successfully.
Read /home/devkit/.pi/agent/extensions/AGENTS.md and follow the temporary PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR live-test rules.
Run or update live Pi smoke tests for accepted NEXT and COMPLETE behavior using explicit tia pi, preferably with PI_RALPH_TEST_MODEL=nahcrof/deepseek-v4-pro-precision and PI_RALPH_TEST_THINKING=high.
Verify rejected NEXT remains in the same session and accepted NEXT creates a fresh session.
Report extension bugs separately from TIA/runtime bugs, direct-Pi entrypoint mismatches, and model/provider issues.
items.regression_notes: Live RPC tests now run through explicit tia pi with a temporary PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR, cover accepted and rejected bundle NEXT lifecycles, and passed with nahcrof/deepseek-v4-pro-precision high thinking. Full npm test and npx tsc --noEmit also pass.
